meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no design skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding for Non-Designers (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with design. Master user onboarding for your SaaS apps using Antigravity and Claude Code. A complete checklist for busy freelancers.
content.answer_block: You don't need design skills to build high-converting onboarding. By leveraging component-first frameworks like Antigravity and AI-driven CLI agents like Claude Code, you can generate professional, high-fidelity onboarding flows in minutes. Focus on clear user intent, modular UI components, and automated state management to deliver premium experiences effortlessly.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the logic, the database, and the API keys, but the moment you touch the UI, the project stalls. Clients don't pay for clean code; they pay for the experience their users feel the moment they sign up. Design paralysis isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of a system.

We are shifting the paradigm. By treating UI as a programmatic challenge rather than an artistic one, we can bypass the 'design phase' entirely. Using Antigravity’s library and the autonomous precision of Claude Code, you will transform your onboarding from a static form into a high-conversion engine, delivering agency-level results with developer-level speed.

steps.title: Define the Value Path
steps.description: Identify the one 'Aha!' moment your user needs. Strip the onboarding down to the bare minimum steps required to reach that state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal 3-step onboarding wizard component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on a progress bar, a centered content area, and a 'Next' button that triggers a state change.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding wizard component with React and Tailwind'

steps.title: Component-Driven UI Assembly
steps.description: Use pre-built Antigravity components to avoid custom CSS styling. This ensures a professional, cohesive look without manual design work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of onboarding input components including a multi-select interest picker and a text input field, following the Antigravity design system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create form inputs using Antigravity UI library'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Connect the UI steps to a local state manager to track user progress and capture data seamlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook to handle multi-step onboarding state transitions, including form data persistence to local storage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add state management for onboarding flow'

steps.title: Add Micro-Interactions
steps.description: Use subtle animations to make the UI feel reactive and premium. This adds perceived value without extra effort.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Framer Motion entrance animations to each onboarding step for a smooth, professional feel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply smooth slide-in animations to the wizard components'

steps.title: Final Conversion Hook
steps.description: Create a high-impact 'Finish' state that confirms the user has successfully completed the setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a success state component with a confetti effect and a primary call-to-action button to redirect to the dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create success screen with redirect logic'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Skip' option; forcing users through onboarding kills conversion rates.
Use mock data early to test the flow before connecting to your backend API.
Keep your onboarding under 4 steps; every extra step reduces completion by 20%.
Leverage existing design systems like Antigravity to avoid the 'custom CSS' trap entirely.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your onboarding state; it prevents broken flows.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a user test session with 3 people, and iterate based on their friction points.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on UI design and start shipping products that convert. Unlock the full potential of your freelance business with our curated AI-first workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
